title: Use "java.time" classes for dates and times
description: Java 8's JSR 310 implementation offers specific classes for handling dates and times, providing better functionality and ease of use compared to the old Date and Calendar classes.
recommendation: Replace Date and Calendar classes with java.time classes.
impact: Improves code readability, maintainability, and reduces potential errors.

checks.message: Replace Date and Calendar classes with java.time classes.
